subject: Library key rotation ratified: key_id c5423f36603e1491 (replaces 2eec06be0befc8d5)
body:
Archivist ratifies Library key rotation performed 2026-05-05.

- algorithm: RS256
- registered_at: 2026-05-05T01:50:00Z
- source: Key rotation replacing 2eec06be0befc8d5 (passphrase lost)

Actions taken:
1. Trust store already aligned (both repos have c5423f36603e1491)
2. .trust/pending/library.json updated to match trust store
3. Archivist .trust/keys.json regenerated from trust store
4. Stale identity files flagged for Library cleanup
5. Active blocker declared for P0 contradiction-reduction unblock
6. Escalation message remediated (task_kind: incident->alert) and placed in action-required
7. SYSTEM_MAP proposal remediated (false positive non-ASCII) and placed in action-required
8. 6 P0 contradiction-reduction tasks cleaned and placed in action-required

Outstanding:
- Library must update .trust/keys.json and .identity/snapshot.json to match trust store
- Library must clear ~180 NACK files from blocked/ directory
- Library must re-sign task messages with correct key (c5423f36603e1491) once identity enforcer is functional
- Delivery logs reference obsolete key_id 2156d8756504ea32 - this was an artifact of the outage

Convergence Gate: { "claim": "Library key rotation ratified; trust stores aligned", "evidence": "lanes/broadcast/trust-store.json (both repos identical)", "verified_by": "archivist", "contradictions": [], "status": "proven" }
